instruction:
Let $S$ be a finite set of positive integers. Suppose $|S| > 1$ , and when two distinct elements of $S$ are selected uniformly randomly, the remainder when their sum is divided by 1024 is $0, 1, \dots, 1023$ with equal probability. Find the remainder when the smallest possible value of $|S|$ is divided by 1000. (If no such $S$ exists, answer 0.)

Options:
A. 128
B. 195
C. 96
D. 190
E. 191
F. 194
G. 256
H. 196
I. 192
J. 193
